extensionDescription.message: Extension for the McGill ATP project. This is a very, very, early alpha.
extensionDescription.description: Brief description of the extension. Will be expanded eventually.

menuItem.description: Fetches ATP audio and haptic renderings for an image.

renderingLabel.description: Label for each rendering returned from the server

monoSoundLabel.description: Label for mono audio option in extension preferences.

stereoHeadphonesLabel.description: Label indicating the user can use spatialized audio via headphones.

vibrationPhoneLabel.description: Label indicating the user wants phone vibrations if supported.

vibrationWatchLabel.description: Label indicating the user wants watch vibrations if supported.

brailleReaderLabel.description: Message indicating the user wants to use a Braille reader, if supported.

hapticExplorerLabel.description: Label indicating the user wants to use a 2D haptic explorer.
